name: Gemini 1.0 Pro
archDisplay: Dense Transformer decoder with multi-query attention
note: General-purpose 1.0 workhorse; powered Bard at launch; shut down on Gemini API (404s on gemini-1.0-pro).

results.notes: Gemini 1.0 Pro MMLU score [relabeled self-reported: aggregator/mirror relay of a vendor figure, not an independent re-measurement]

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: Gemini Pro API access for developers opened 2023-12-13 (confirmed via TechCrunch, SiliconANGLE, Google Developers Blog -- distinct from the 2023-12-06 announcement date used for the Ultra/Nano records), with a 32K context window at that time, matching ctxK. Re-fetched llm-stats.com comparison page via search: it literally lists Gemini 1.0 Pro MMLU as 71.8%, matching the record exactly.
